acceptance_criteria: AO supports multiple auth profiles per provider with explicit ordering and stored usage/cooldown state.
On retryable failures, runtime rotates to the next eligible profile using bounded backoff before escalating to model fallback.
When profile rotation is exhausted, runtime falls back through a configured model chain and emits structured failover events.
Session-level pinning/override behavior is documented and test-covered so operators can force a specific profile/model when needed.
CLI commands expose profile health/status and failover diagnostics for troubleshooting.
description:
Agent execution reliability improves by rotating credentials within a provider and failing over across configured models when rate limits, auth errors, or provider outages occur.

Implementation boundary: orchestrator-cli plus agent-runner runtime contract and state handling; excludes provider-specific SDK additions unrelated to failover.
title: Implement auth-profile rotation and model failover for agent runs
